headline: Malaysia Cyber Fraud Cooperation With Singapore Recovers RM320 Million
context: Joint Malaysia-Singapore cyber fraud cooperation recovered RM320 million for victims of cross-border scams in 2025.

cards.big: Malaysia-Singapore cyber cooperation recovered RM320 million in 2025
cards.sub: Joint task force processes real-time account freezing across both jurisdictions

cards.big: 1,800 cross-border fraud cases handled under bilateral framework in 2025
cards.sub: Average recovery time reduced from 14 days to 48 hours

cards.big: Scam syndicates used Singapore bank accounts to receive Malaysian victim funds
cards.sub: 280 Singapore-based mule accounts identified and frozen during operations

cards.big: Joint arrest operations netted 45 suspects across both countries
cards.sub: Information sharing agreement allows police to access partner banking records

cards.big: Cross-border cooperation tests whether neighbouring jurisdictions can close scam escape routes
RM320 million recovered through Singapore cyber fraud cooperation. Cross-border crime needs cross-border enforcement.
